recommendations.title: Teen Beach 2
recommendations.overview: When characters from the movie musical “Wet Side Story” get stuck in the real world, teens Brady and Mack must find a way to return them home.

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.

recommendations.title: Descendants 3
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Fantasy, Music
recommendations.overview: The teenagers of Disney's most infamous villains return to the Isle of the Lost to recruit a new batch of villainous offspring to join them at Auradon Prep.

recommendations.title: The Muppet Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: A retelling of the classic Dickens tale of Ebenezer Scrooge, miser extraordinaire. He is held accountable for his dastardly ways during night-time visitations by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

recommendations.title: Descendants 2
recommendations.genres: Family, Fantasy, TV Movie, Adventure, Music
recommendations.overview: When the pressure to be royal becomes too much for Mal, she returns to the Isle of the Lost where her archenemy Uma, Ursula's daughter, has taken her spot as self-proclaimed queen.

recommendations.title: Anne of Green Gables
recommendations.overview: A retelling of L.M. Montgomery's story of Anne Shirley, an orphan who is accidentally sent to a couple looking to adopt a boy instead.

recommendations.title: Descendants
recommendations.genres: Family, Adventure, Fantasy, TV Movie, Music
recommendations.overview: A present-day idyllic kingdom where the benevolent teenage son of King Adam and Queen Belle offers a chance of redemption for the troublemaking offspring of Disney's classic villains: Cruella De Vil (Carlos), Maleficent (Mal), the Evil Queen (Evie) a

recommendations.title: Under the Sea: A Descendants Story
recommendations.overview: Mal emerges from the shadows of a mystical forest onto a dark coastline where she crosses paths with Dizzy.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: The Last Song
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on a rebellious girl who is sent to a Southern beach town for the summer to stay with her father. Through their mutual love of music, the estranged duo learn to reconnect.
